title: 'YES! Come play!' — kids enter, group tag begins
prompt: Wide shot of @tennis-court — green court with white lines, chain-link fence softly visible BACKGROUND, soft warm afternoon light. POSITION LOCK — every character stays in their EXACT same physical spot from second 0 through second 10. Exactly THREE kids in the entire frame: one Sara, one Eva, one Isabel. (Leo is NOT in this clip — he stays just outside the frame with Papa, off-screen.) @Sara already CENTER-LEFT standing on the green court with both feet planted, ponytail with bow under @pink-helmet (buckled), both arms held out wide in a warm welcoming 'come on in' gesture, beaming with cheerful kid joy. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both held out wide. Sara stays at this exact spot throughout. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the green court with both feet planted next to Sara, curly blonde hair under @teal-helmet (buckled), both hands cupped softly at her mouth in a cheerful 'come on!' shout-gesture, beaming brightly. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both cupped at mouth. Eva stays at this exact spot throughout. @Isabel already FAR-RIGHT standing on the green court a few steps from Eva with both feet planted (already on the court — she has come through the fence gate which is off-frame), kindergartener girl with curly brunette hair, kind shy smile, both hands clasped together at her chest in a delighted 'oh thank you!' gesture. Isabel has exactly two arms and two hands visible — both clasped at chest. Isabel stays at this exact spot throughout. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara waves both her open hands warmly in welcome from her exact spot. Sara (warm cheerful kid-voice, sing-song bright): "YES! Come play with us!" Eva, hands still cupped at her mouth, calls out cheerfully. Eva (cheerful sing-song call): "We have a tennis ball! Catch it with us!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Isabel beams brightly from her exact spot, both hands still clasped at her chest. Isabel (kind kindergartener voice, warm and shy with delight): "Yay! Thank you! What do we play first?" Sara (cheerful kid-voice, both hands still wide): "TAG! Everyone's IT!" Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both held out wide. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both cupped at mouth. Isabel has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both clasped at chest. Each girl stays grounded with both feet on the green court throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no running. Helmets stay buckled.
